title: ThingsBoard RuleChain
description: A JSON value representing the rule chain.

id.description: JSON object with the Rule Chain Id. Specify this field to update the Rule Chain. Referencing non-existing Rule Chain Id will cause error. Omit this field to create new rule chain.

createdTime.description: Timestamp of the rule chain creation, in milliseconds

type.description: Rule Chain type. 'EDGE' rule chains are processing messages on the edge devices only.

firstRuleNodeId.description: JSON object with Rule Chain Id. Pointer to the first rule node that should receive all messages pushed to this rule chain.

root.description: Indicates root rule chain. The root rule chain process messages from all devices and entities by default. User may configure default rule chain per device profile.
